input.background: Consider these eight data points: 1.47, 2.06, 2.36, 3.43, 3.74, 3.78, 3.94, 4.42. Data have three significant digits although only two are needed for plotting.
input.question: Determine the spread of the data.

output.answer: Spread: Data spread from about 1.4 to 4.4.

data_points.description: A set of numerical data points used to determine the spread of the data.
